Who We Are

The Biggest & Most Trusted Name in Al Jalil Garden

Al Karam Real Estate is an authorized sub-dealer of Al Jalil Developers — one of Pakistan's leading real estate and infrastructure companies. We specialize in property sales, purchases, and marketing across Lahore's most prestigious housing society.

With our office on Main Boulevard, Al Jalil Garden (2 km from Faizpur Interchange), we provide on-ground support, transparent dealings, and personalized service to every client.

LDA Approved Projects
Transparent Dealings
On-Ground Support
Easy Installment Plans
Partnered With Al Jalil Developers
SZG
Leadership

Sheikh Zaheer Ghazanfar

Chief Executive Officer — Al Karam Real Estate

Under the visionary leadership of Sheikh Zaheer Ghazanfar, Al Karam Real Estate has grown to become the biggest and most trusted real estate partner in Al Jalil Garden Housing Scheme. His commitment to transparency, customer satisfaction, and ethical business practices has established Al Karam as the go-to name for property investment in Lahore.

Integrity First

Every transaction built on trust and transparency

Client-Centric

Personalized service for every client, every time

Results Driven

500+ properties sold with 100% client satisfaction

What We Do

Our Services

01

Sale & Purchase

Complete assistance in buying and selling residential & commercial plots across all blocks in Al Jalil Garden Housing Scheme.

Get In Touch →
02

Property Marketing

Strategic marketing campaigns to sell your property faster. We leverage our network of 1800+ clients for maximum exposure and best returns.

Get In Touch →
03

File Verification

Thorough verification of all property documentation and ownership history. We ensure every transaction is legally sound and fully transparent.

Get In Touch →
04

Virtual Site Tours

Can't visit in person? Explore the complete Al Jalil Garden development through our immersive 360° virtual tour experience from anywhere.

Take the Tour →
Immersive Experience

Explore Al Jalil Garden in 360°

Walk through the streets, parks, and amenities of Al Jalil Garden without leaving your home. Our interactive virtual tour lets you experience every detail.

Launch Virtual Tour
Our Project

Al Jalil Garden Housing Scheme

LDA APPROVED

Suburbs of Lahore — Lahore's Largest Housing Project in Lahore West

A gated community featuring Cinema, Pizza Hut, Gloria Jeans, Jade Cafe, Water Filtration Plant, 24/7 Power Backup, Underground Electricity, Jamia Masjid, Sports Complex, Steppingstone School, and Al-Jalil Healthcare. A complete ecosystem for modern, secure, and luxurious living.

Easy Financing

Flexible Payment Plans

We believe everyone deserves their dream property. Our easy installment plans make home ownership accessible and stress-free.

FEATURED DEAL

6-Month Plan

Al Jalil Garden Housing Scheme

  • 3 Equal Installments
  • Possession on Down Payment
  • All Plot Sizes (3, 5, 10, 15 Marla)
  • Multiple Blocks Available
  • On-Ground Ready Plots
